title: Kingdom Blue Medium Internal Cooling Gel Pet Mat (40 cm x 60 cm) 1 Piece - Safe & Non-Toxic, Ideal for Dogs up to 30kg
features: STAY COOL: Keep your furry friend comfortable during those hot summer days with our medium pet cooling mat (40 cm x 60 cm) featuring an internal cooling gel that activates with your pet's weight. No power required.

QUALITY MATERIALS: Made with the highest quality materials, our pet mat is made to last. The polyester and PVC materials are durable and can withstand regular use by your pets, ensuring that they have a comfortable spot to cool down whenever they need it.

SAFE & NON-TOXIC: Our pet mat is made with your pet's safety in mind, the cooling gel is non-toxic, ensuring a safe and cool spot for your pet to relax. It's also free from harmful chemicals making it safe for both your pet and the environment.

VERSATILE & PORTABLE: Ideal for dogs up to 30kg, this versatile mat can be used at home, in the car, or anywhere you want to provide a cool, comfortable spot for your pet. Its lightweight and foldable design make it easy to transport.

WATER RESISTANT & EASY TO CLEAN: Our blue pet mat is designed to be water-resistant, making it easy to clean up any spills or accidents. Simply wipe it down with a damp cloth and it will be good as new, saving you time and effort.
description: Product Description Water-resistant material that is easy to wipe clean. Directions store in a cool dry place Safety Warning No warning applicable See more
